sources.title: Helsinki Kalasatama official mesh
sources.license_summary: Use the official Helsinki 3D terms on the source page before shipping.
notes: Waterfront high-rise district suited to Nanite and World Partition.

sources.title: Berlin official 3D city model portal
sources.license_summary: Verify the portal terms and selected tile package before shipping.
notes: Strong fallback pilot when Helsinki is unsuitable.
Use a bounded district, not the full city.

sources.title: 3DBAG OBJ delivery
sources.license_summary: Verify current 3DBAG terms on the copyright page before shipping.
notes: Useful when the workflow needs open tiling and geometry control.
Expect more preprocessing than with an official integrated mesh.
